Linen tea towel set

$32.0

Description

A set of two heavyweight linen tea towels woven on a small loom in Lithuania. Pre-washed for softness and finished with hand-rolled hems.

Each towel measures 45 × 70 cm.

MaterialLinen
ColorNatural / Indigo
Weight220g
